OverridePut.description: Request to force an actuator. The actuator is taken from the path; this body carries the forced state, an optional auto-expiry, and (for irrigation_valve) the target zone.

ttl_secs.description: Seconds until the override auto-expires; omit or null to use the controller's configured default timeout (controller spec §10).

zone_id.description: Target zone, required for the per-zone irrigation_valve; null/absent for house-level actuators.
Target zone for a per-zone actuator (irrigation_valve); null for house-level actuators.

created_at.description: When the override was set (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

expires_at.description: When the override auto-expires (RFC 3339 UTC, ms), or null for no timeout.
